title: anthyllis albiflora
intro: Anthyllis albiflora, also known as white kidney vetch or white bird's-foot, is a flowering plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthyllis albiflora include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea, and skin conditions, like eczema. Herbal preparations of Anthyllis albiflora can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
